Here is the list of scores for each sign in Astrology $Line:
1. Aries - 8/10 - Natural leadership and action-oriented, but also impulsive and reckless.
2. Taurus - 7.5/10 - Practical and reliable, but also stubborn and resistant to change.
3. Gemini - 9/10 - Quick-witted and adaptable, but also scattered and restless.
4. Cancer - 8.5/10 - Nurturing and emotional, but also moody and clingy.
5. Leo - 8/10 - Confident and charismatic, but also prideful and domineering.
6. Virgo - 9.5/10 - Analytical and detail-oriented, but also perfectionistic and critical.
7. Libra - 8.5/10 - Diplomatic and social, but also indecisive and people-pleasing.
8. Scorpio - 9/10 - Passionate and intense, but also secretive and controlling.
9. Sagittarius - 8.5/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, but also blunt and tactless.
10. Capricorn - 7/10 - Responsible and ambitious, but also stern and unyielding.
11. Aquarius - 8.5/10 - Humanitarian and independent, but also aloof and rebellious.
12. Pisces - 9/10 - Compassionate and imaginative, but also dreamy and unrealistic.
Please note that these scores are subjective and based on general interpretations of the signs' traits.
